# The Royal Clay Oven

The Royal Clay Oven is an authentic Pakistani restaurant and takeaway located in Shannon, County Clare, Ireland. We specialize in flame-grilled charcoal tandoor (clay oven) cooked dishes, naans, traditional kebabs, curries, and gourmet pizzas.

## Contact Information
- **Phone**: 061 703 636
- **Mobile / WhatsApp**: 089 489 9950
- **Email**: customers@clayoven.ie
- **Address**: Ballycasey Craft And Design Center, Shannon, County Clare, V14 AW71
- **Domain**: https://www.clayoven.ie

## Pages & Deep Links
- **Home**: https://www.clayoven.ie/
- **Menu Booklet**: https://www.clayoven.ie/menu
- **Takeaway Order (Online Collection)**: https://www.clayoven.ie/takeaway
- **Table Reservations**: https://www.clayoven.ie/booking

## Core Offerings & Dietary
- **100% Halal**: All meat is sourced locally and is certified 100% Halal.
- **Charcoal Tandoor**: Traditional clay oven fueled with charcoal for authentic high-fire cooking of naans, chicken tikka, and tandoori seekh kebabs.
- **Service Types**: Online ordering for collection (takeaway) and standard table reservations.
